sectionHeading.description: I design scalable infrastructure, automate workflows, and deliver performant applications with clean architecture.

aboutCard.title: Cloud engineer with DevOps mindset
aboutCard.description: Focused on building scalable cloud systems with automation, security, and performance in mind. I turn complex infrastructure into simple, reliable deployments. I enjoy designing end-to-end workflows from local development to production, including containerization, CI/CD pipelines, observability, and deployment hardening. My goal is to ship systems that are easy to maintain, cost-aware, and resilient under real usage.
